{# detail.html — Vendor detail drawer with tabbed content area. Receives: vendor (ORM object), contact_count (int), user. Called by: views.py vendor_detail endpoint. Depends on: Alpine.js (tab switching, close), HTMX (tab lazy-loading, enrich). #}

{{ vendor.display_name }}

{% if vendor.vendor_score is not none %} Score: {{ vendor.vendor_score | round(1) }} {% endif %} {% if vendor.is_blacklisted %} Blacklisted {% endif %} {% if vendor.industry %} {{ vendor.industry }} {% endif %}
Loading... {% if vendor.phones %} Call {% endif %}
{# Tab bar #}
{% for tab_key, tab_label in [('overview', 'Overview'), ('contacts', 'Contacts'), ('analytics', 'Analytics'), ('offers', 'Offers')] %} {% endfor %}
{# Tab content — loads overview on open #}
